steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The parenthetical statement is crucial: words used in specialized or academic publications are “poorly represented” in the corpus. This signals that the blank describes words that ARE well-represented—the opposite end of the spectrum.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Conventional” means standard, commonly-used language—the type of words that would be well-represented in a general corpus, exemplified by “world” as the eighth most common noun.

The other choices misdescribe the word type: trivial emphasizes importance rather than frequency, profound suggests rarity rather than commonness, and accidental is irrelevant to word distribution.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
